hooks.command: bash -c 'staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$staged" | grep -qE "^\.claude/state/.*\.json$"; then echo "BLOCKED: .claude/state/*.json files should not be committed" >&2; exit 1; fi; if echo "$staged" | grep -qiE "\.(env|pem|key)$|credentials|secret"; then echo "BLOCKED: Potential secrets file staged" >&2; exit 1; fi'
